name: BeYourCat
short_description: "Be Your Cat " is a real love game,like an experience in life, one interesting dream. We all wish we had superpowers, but what would you do if one day you had superpowers, but not like Superman? What will you do with your limited abilities? How does it affect and change the people around you?
detailed_description:
“Be Your Cat” is a live-action interactive game, and we want players to experience something different in this game. The player will be the first person to change and influence the people around him through their accidental acquisition of superpowers, several young, beautiful women with different styles.
The game itself has a lot of tentative things, for example, the game will have more choices, so the difficulty may be a little bit more, some choices may have immediate impact, some choices may take a while to show the impact. We didn't want beautiful women to make the game more fun, we wanted the game itself to make the player feel something different.

Xia

My university goddess has a relationship with me of AU or above, and my lover is not yet full

Li

My classmate and ex girlfriend are entangled with me

Jin

My elementary school girl, a wealthy heiress

Song

Senior sister, also my immediate supervisor

Weng

I don't understand my mysterious college classmates

Liu

College classmate, a man who likes girls
